name: Bubbly Berry Lattice Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Fresh blueberries or 2 pk (9 oz.) unsweetened frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Place large size (14 X 20") oven cooking bag on a large cookie sheet.
3. In a bowl, coat blueberries with 3 tablespoons flour.
4. Roll out pastry for the bottom crust and fit it into a pan. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar and remaining flour.
5. Pour in blueberries, sprinkle with lemon juice and remaining sugar.
6. Dot with butter.
7. Add lattice top crust made with remaining pastry.
8. Slide pie into bag. Close bag with nylon tie.
9. Make 6 half-inch slits in the top.
10. Bake for 1 hour or until syrup boils and crust is brown.
